title: 10 best herbal essential oils for hair fall
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for hair fall are natural remedies derived from plants, which help to prevent and treat hair loss by promoting hair growth, reducing dandruff, and soothing an itchy scalp. The best herbal essential oils for hair fall include Rosmarinus officinalis, Aloe barbadensis, Urtica dioica, Melaleuca alternifolia, Santalum album, Lavandula angustifolia, Cymbopogon citratus, Curcuma longa, Cinnamomum camphora, and Mentha x piperita. If left untreated, hair fall can lead to emotional distress, low self-esteem, and social withdrawal, negatively impacting one's overall quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary essential oils helps with hair fall because of its ability to stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The antioxidants present in rosemary oil also help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, rosemary oil's natural astringent properties can help to tighten the hair follicles and promote new growth. Regular use of rosemary essential oil may lead to thicker, fuller-looking hair, reducing the appearance of bald spots and promoting overall scalp health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Rosemary essential oil's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss and thinning.

Improves blood circulation: Rosemary essential oil helps to increase blood flow to the scalp, which can stimulate hair growth and improve hair density by delivering oxygen and nutrients to the hair follicles.

Stimulates hair growth: Rosemary essential oil contains compounds that stimulate the hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the risk of hair loss due to slowed or stopped hair growth.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, rosemary leaves are ideal for promoting hair growth and reducing dandruff.
Stems: The stems of the rosemary plant contain a higher concentration of camphor and borneol, which help to improve blood circulation and reduce scalp irritation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves at dawn on a sunny day for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm and dry place for seven days to reduce moisture content.
Use 100 grams of dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves and combine them with 400 milliliters of carrier oil like coconut or olive oil.
Steam distill the mixture using a clevenger apparatus for two hours and record the yield of essential oil.
Filter and store the extracted essential oil in dark glass bottles at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sesame essential oils helps with hair fall because it nourishes the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. The antioxidants present in sesame oil strengthen hair follicles, reducing breakage and brittleness. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe an itchy scalp, which can contribute to hair loss. By massaging sesame essential oil into the scalp, it stimulates blood flow, promoting the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to the hair roots, leading to thicker, fuller, and healthier-looking locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Sesame essential oil's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing hair fall.

Inflammation reduction: Sesame essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss and thinning, allowing for healthier hair growth.

Wound healing and cicatrisation: Sesame essential oil's wound-healing and cicatrisation properties help to promote rapid healing of damaged hair follicles and improve blood flow to the scalp, reducing hair fall and promoting thicker, fuller hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sesame roots are used to treat dandruff and other scalp issues, promoting healthy hair growth.
Seeds: Sesame seeds contain antioxidants and fatty acids that nourish the scalp, reducing inflammation and promoting hair regrowth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest sesamum indicum seeds in full bloom, ensuring maximum oil content and potency.
Dry the sesame seeds in a warm oven at 60°c for 6-8 hours, monitoring moisture levels carefully.
Crush the dried sesame seeds into fine particles using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Steam distill the crushed sesame seeds with water in a 1:1 ratio, processing for 2-3 hours to extract oil.
Filter the resulting essential oil through cheesecloth or filter paper, discarding solids and preserving the clear liquid for use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm essential oils helps with hair fall because it promotes a healthy scalp environment, reducing inflammation and soothing irritations that can lead to excessive shedding. Its antioxidant properties also help protect hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting strong and resilient hair growth. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects can reduce stress and anxiety, known triggers of hair loss. By incorporating lemon balm essential oils into your hair care routine, you may experience a decrease in hair fall and an increase in healthy, luscious locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm essential oil has antioxidant properties that help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing hair fall and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemon balm essential oil can help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is a common cause of hair loss, and promote healthy blood flow to the hair follicles.

Stress-relieving properties: Lemon balm essential oil has been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce stress-related hair loss (telogen effluvium) by promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are good for making medicinal essential oils for hair fall as they contain high levels of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to promote healthy scalp circulation and reduce dandruff.
Flowers: The flowers are used to create a calming and soothing essential oil that helps to reduce stress and tension, which can contribute to hair loss.
Leaves: The leaves of the lemon balm plant contain high levels of citral, a natural compound that has been shown to promote hair growth and strengthen hair follicles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality melissa officinalis leaves and flowers.
Dry the plant material using a gentle heat source or air drying method.
Combine 10-15% of dried plant material with 85-90% carrier oil like jojoba or sweet almond oil.
Allow the mixture to steep for 2-3 weeks, shaking occasionally, to facilitate infusion.
Strain and discard solids, filtering the remaining liquid through cheesecloth or a coffee filter.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe essential oils helps with hair fall because of its remarkable ability to nourish and rejuvenate the scalp. The oil's anti-inflammatory properties soothe an itchy scalp, reducing irritation that can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, aloe vera's antioxidant-rich composition promotes collagen production, strengthening hair follicles and preventing breakage. As a result, herbal aloe essential oils help stimulate hair growth, promote healthy hair texture, and reduce the appearance of split ends, leaving you with luscious, full hair that looks vibrant and healthy.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal aloe essential oil's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and damage to hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory properties of herbal aloe essential oil soothe the scalp and reduce inflammation, which can contribute to hair loss by damaging hair follicles and blocking new growth.
Wound healing properties: Herbal aloe essential oil's wound healing properties help promote cell regeneration and tissue repair on the scalp, which can aid in hair regrowth and reduce hair fall.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe leaves are rich in nutrients and antioxidants, making them ideal for creating essential oils that promote healthy hair growth and prevent hair loss.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome of aloe contains compounds that stimulate blood circulation, which helps to nourish the scalp and promote hair follicle health.
remedy_recipe: Collect 2 cups of fresh aloe vera leaves and rinse them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the aloe vera leaves in the sun for 3-4 days or use a food dehydrator at 150°f for 6 hours.
Crush 1 cup of dried aloe vera leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 100 ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil with the crushed aloe vera powder in a clean glass jar and let it sit at room temperature for 2 weeks, shaking the jar daily.

Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container, discarding the solids and transferring the liquid to dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass essential oils helps with hair fall because it possesses antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that promote a healthy scalp environment. It increases blood circulation, which nourishes the hair follicles, strengthening them from within. Additionally, lemongrass oil's antifungal and antibacterial properties help control dandruff, itchiness, and irritation, reducing the risk of hair loss caused by these issues. By using lemongrass essential oils, you can stimulate hair growth and improve overall hair health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemongrass essential oil's antioxidant properties help to protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass essential oil can help reduce inflammation on the scalp, which is a common cause of hair loss conditions such as alopecia areata, and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.

Stimulating and toning properties: Lemongrass essential oil's stimulating and toning properties can help to increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting hair growth by providing essential nutrients and oxygen to the hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to nourish the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
Stems: The stems of lemongrass contain a high concentration of citral, which has been shown to stimulate blood flow to the scalp and improve hair density.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh leaves of cymbopogon citratus, ensuring they are free from pests and diseases.
Dry the harvested leaves in shade for 7-10 days or using a food dehydrator at 50°c for 2 hours.
Steam distill the dried leaves with water in a still apparatus at atmospheric pressure for 4 hours.
Collect the essential oil by separating it from the water and other compounds, resulting in a 1% concentration.
Filter and store the cymbopogon citratus essential oil in dark glass bottles, using within 6 months of preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme essential oils helps with hair fall because it promotes a healthy scalp environment, reducing inflammation and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss. The oil's antifungal properties also combat dandruff and other scalp infections that can disrupt hair growth. Additionally, thyme essential oil's antioxidant properties help to strengthen the hair follicles, promoting thicker, healthier hair growth. By using thyme essential oils regularly, you can help to reduce hair fall and promote a fuller, more luxurious head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Thyme essential oil helps reduce oxidative stress and damage to the hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme essential oil's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by preventing proper blood flow and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles.
Antimicrobial properties: Thyme essential oil's antimicrobial activity helps combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause hair loss and scalp issues like dandruff and itching.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Thyme leaves are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in promoting healthy scalp circulation and reducing dandruff.
Flowers: Thyme flowers contain flavonoids and terpenes that help soothe irritated scalps, reduce inflammation, and promote hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves from your garden or local market in the early morning hours ensuring optimal potency.
Wash the harvested thymus vulgaris leaves thoroughly with distilled water and mild soap to remove any impurities.
Steam distill the washed thymus vulgaris leaves using a steam distillation apparatus for approximately 2-3 hours yielding essential oil.
Separate the obtained essential oil from the hydrosol and other solids using a separating funnel and store in dark glass bottles at room temperature.
Use a dropper to apply 5-7 drops of the thymus vulgaris essential oil to your scalp twice daily after shampooing and before styling for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Curry plant essential oils helps with hair fall because of its unique blend of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory properties, and stimulating compounds. The oil's antimicrobial agents help to purify the scalp, reducing dandruff and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss. Its antioxidant properties also help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth. Additionally, the oil's stimulating compounds increase blood flow to the scalp, nourishing the hair roots and encouraging thicker, fuller locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Curry leaf oil's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the risk of hair loss and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in curry leaf oil reduce inflammation on the scalp, which can lead to hair fall due to conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, or eczema, and promote a healthy scalp environment for hair growth.
Stimulant Properties: Curry leaf oil's stimulant properties help increase blood circulation to the scalp, promoting hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen to the hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in promoting hair growth and reducing dandruff.
Seeds: Containing natural oils that nourish and moisturize the scalp, helping to reduce hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of fresh helichrysum italicum leaves and stems from organic farms or your own garden.
Wash the plant material gently in cold running water to remove dirt and debris then pat dry thoroughly.
Steam distill the plant material using a clevenger apparatus for 3-4 hours to obtain 100 milliliters of essential oil.
Filter the essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth into a dark glass bottle with an eyedropper top to remove any impurities.
Store the essential oil in a cool dark place for at least 24 hours before using it to help combat hair fall and promote healthy scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle essential oils helps with hair fall because of its unique ability to promote blood circulation to the scalp, stimulating hair growth. The antioxidants present in the oil also help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can cause hair loss. Additionally, stinging nettle's natural antibacterial properties help to eliminate fungal and bacterial infections that can contribute to hair fall. By nourishing and protecting the hair follicles, stinging nettle essential oils promote healthy, strong, and luscious locks.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Stinging nettle essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties can reduce redness, itching, and swelling on the scalp, creating a healthy environment for hair growth to thrive.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of stinging nettle essential oil help protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing breakage.

Stimulates circulation: Stinging nettle essential oil's ability to stimulate blood flow to the scalp can increase oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles, promoting a healthier and more robust hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Stinging nettle roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce scalp inflammation and promote healthy hair growth.
Leaves: The leaves of the stinging nettle plant are rich in antioxidants and vitamins A, C, and E, which nourish the scalp and promote hair follicle health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh nettle leaves and flowers on a sunny day in mid-summer.
Dry the harvested nettle material using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 6 hours.
Steam distill the dried nettle material with 1 liter of water for 4 hours to extract oil.
Filter the resulting oil through a coffee filter paper to remove impurities and sediment.
Store the final essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold essential oils helps with hair fall because of its exceptional nourishing properties. It is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that promote healthy scalp and hair growth. The oil's anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritated scalps, reduce dandruff, and prevent flaking, allowing hair follicles to thrive. Additionally, marigold essential oil stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth and strengthening hair roots, leading to thicker, fuller hair and reduced hair fall.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot Marigold essential oil has anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and redness in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss conditions like psoriasis, eczema, and dandruff.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant activity of Pot Marigold essential oil helps neutralize free radicals that damage hair follicles and promote hair growth, making it an effective natural remedy for preventing hair fall.

Antibacterial properties: Pot Marigold essential oil has antibacterial properties that help combat scalp infections like dandruff, ringworm, and other fungal conditions that can cause hair loss by damaging hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Potent natural remedy for promoting hair growth and strengthening roots, reducing dandruff and itchiness.
Flowers: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, they help soothe scalp irritations, reduce redness, and promote a healthy hair environment.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh calendula flowers in their full bloom and dry them thoroughly using air circulation or desiccant machines.
Grind dried calendula flowers into fine powder using mortar and pestle with gentle pressure for about 10 minutes.
Transfer ground calendula powder to a clean glass jar and infuse it with carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in ratio of 1:5.
Place the jar in a warm dark place for at least 2 weeks, shaking occasionally, allowing the mixture to steep and extract essential oils.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass container and store it in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sandalwood essential oils helps with hair fall because of its unique properties that promote healthy scalp circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and nourish the hair follicles. The oil's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds help to calm an itchy scalp, while its moisturizing properties hydrate dry hair and stimulate hair growth. Additionally, sandalwood oil's natural antibacterial and antifungal properties help to prevent infections that can cause hair loss, making it a valuable addition to any hair care routine.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Sandalwood essential oil's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory properties of sandalwood essential oil help reduce inflammation on the scalp, which can be a contributing factor to hair loss conditions such as alopecia areata.
Antimicrobial properties: Sandalwood essential oil's antimicrobial properties help combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause hair loss, such as dandruff, ringworm, and folliculitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesquiterpenes, the roots of sandalwood help to stimulate hair growth and improve scalp health.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of sandalwood contain a high concentration of alpha-santalol, which has been shown to promote healthy hair growth and reduce dandruff.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh santalum album leaves in the morning when dew is still present on the leaves for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm dark place for 7-10 days to remove excess moisture.
Combine 20 grams of dried santalum album leaves with 500 ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Allow the mixture to steep for 14 days, shaking the jar daily to facilitate infusion, and then filter it using cheesecloth or a coffee filter.
Store the resulting essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, away from direct sunlight and heat sources for up to 6 months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hair fall with herbal essential oils is to blend a mixture of lavender, rosemary, and thyme oils with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil. Massage the blend into your scalp daily to stimulate blood flow and promote healthy hair growth. Regular use can help reduce dandruff, itchiness, and excess shedding.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hair fall that are treated with herbal essential oils are skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis. Certain essential oils like tea tree oil, lavender oil, and chamomile oil have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help soothe and calm the skin. Additionally, essential oils like rosemary oil and thyme oil can be used to treat nail fungus and dandruff, which are also related to hair fall. These oils promote healthy growth and improve overall scalp health.
